creator: o.kryvulia@flex-it.com.ua
text:
Created attachment 222914
patch

Running net-mgmt/pnp with php7 cause an error:

Please check the documentation for information about the following error.

Function get_magic_quotes_runtime() is deprecated
file [line]:

/usr/local/lib/kohana/system/libraries/Input.php [57]:

It is possible an upstream bug. Proposed patch simply disables using of this deprecated functions.
